# Chris Misztur

> Chris Misztur is the President & Founder of Mr. IIoT, specializing in building Smart Factories, both real and virtual. With over two decades of experience, he integrates business systems into manufacturing processes, leveraging technical expertise to identify inefficiencies and apply innovative Industry 4.0 technologies.

Based in the Greater Chicago Area, Chris has 25+ years of experience in Industrial IoT, Smart Factory, Industry 4.0, and Digital Transformation, particularly in manufacturing. He is the developer of the "5C" closed-loop feedback approach to IIoT implementation (Connect, Collect, Combine, Compute, Convey) and a patent holder in embedded systems for manufacturing.

## Pages
/ (Home): Overview of Chris Misztur's expertise, services, and client testimonials.
/about.html (About): Detailed biography, professional timeline, and core values.
/services.html (Services): Comprehensive list of digital transformation, business system integration, and industrial automation services, including SHARC IoT Adapter and DIME Software Suite.
/solutions.html (Solutions): Specific industry solutions for discrete manufacturing, metal fabrication, automotive supply chain, food & beverage, packaging, industrial equipment OEMs, aerospace, and defense.
/process.html (Process): Explanation of the 4-step methodology: Discovery, Design, Deploy, and Deliver.
/contact.html (Contact): Contact information and options to get in touch.
/audit.html (Free IIoT Assessment): Details about a complimentary 30-minute consultation to evaluate digital transformation readiness.
